headline: A Look At Essex Property Trust (ESS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Recent performance snapshot Essex Property Trust (ESS) has drawn fresh attention after a recent pullback, with the stock down about 1.4% over the past week and roughly flat over the past year. At a recent close of US$272.64 and a market value near US$18.1b, the West Coast focused apartment REIT shows a mix of modest annual revenue growth and declining net income, which gives investors several angles to assess. See our latest analysis for Essex Property Trust. For context, Essex’s share price...
